title: Waiters and Waitresses
description: Take orders and serve food and beverages to patrons at tables in dining establishment.

tasks.text: Collect payments from customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check patrons' identification to ensure that they meet minimum age requirements for consumption of alcoholic beverages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write patrons' food orders on order slips, memorize orders, or enter orders into computers for transmittal to kitchen staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check with customers to ensure that they are enjoying their meals, and take action to correct any problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take orders from patrons for food or beverages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare checks that itemize and total meal costs and sales taxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove dishes and glasses from tables or counters, and take them to kitchen for cleaning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean tables or counters after patrons have finished dining.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve food or beverages to patrons, and prepare or serve specialty dishes at tables as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform cleaning duties, such as sweeping and mopping floors, vacuuming carpet, tidying up server station, taking out trash, or checking and cleaning bathroom.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Present menus to patrons and answer questions about menu items, making recommendations upon request.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare tables for meals, including setting up items such as linens, silverware, and glassware.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock service areas with supplies such as coffee, food, tableware, and linens.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Roll silverware, set up food stations, or set up dining areas to prepare for the next shift or for large parties.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform customers of daily specials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain how various menu items are prepared, describing ingredients and cooking methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist host or hostess by answering phones to take reservations or to-go orders, and by greeting, seating, and thanking guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill salt, pepper, sugar, cream, condiment, and napkin containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform food preparation duties, such as preparing salads, appetizers, and cold dishes, portioning desserts, and brewing coffee.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare hot, cold, and mixed drinks for patrons, and chill bottles of wine.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Escort customers to their tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide guests with information about local areas, including directions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Garnish and decorate dishes in preparation for serving.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bring wine selections to tables with appropriate glasses, and pour the wines for customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Describe and recommend wines to customers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
